dlg.text: It's amazing what a little game can do! As you finish playing with the newly arrived cat, you notice its ears seem a little less droopy than before.
Maybe this is your chance to learn who it is and where it comes from.

choices.text: Tell the cat something about yourself

dlg.text: Oh, um, me? I don't know, really. {There's not much to say}
dlg.speaker: Reluctant Cat

choices.text: Press the cat with more questions
Tell the cat something about yourself

e2s3.bubbleText: {"Oh, I don't know. I guess I ... Oh, ... really, I ..."}

dlg.text: The cat drops its eyes to the ground as you ask it more questions, and you notice its ears droop a little again. It gets so shy that you can barely hear its vague reply.

choices.text: Keep prodding the cat for information about itself
Tell the cat something about yourself

dlg.text: The cat stays totally silent, looking a little overwhelmed. It doesn't move away from you, though.

choices.text: Keep prodding the cat for information about itself
Tell the cat something about yourself

dlg.text: That's it! Maybe if you share something about yourself, it will help the reluctant cat feel a little less shy. It's worth a try, isn't it?

end.label: My Pixel Academy: Prequels & Origins
end.sub: Time to write a little about yourself!
